title: koeleria sibirica
intro: Koeleria sibirica, also known as Siberian hair-grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria sibirica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria sibirica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
